title: LLM Knowledge Extraction Template
description: Returned by the LLM for each text chunk during ingest Step 2. Maps to raw_chunks, pages, and tags tables.

chunk_summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary of this specific chunk's content. Maps to raw_chunks.summary and shared with page_timeline.source_description.
chunk_summary.example: 本文件规定了缓考申请的流程：学生需在考试前48小时提交申请表，经辅导员和教务处双重审批后方可缓考。

page_title.description: Concise, descriptive title for the wiki page entity. Maps to pages.title.

compiled_truth.description: Synthesized factual description of what this chunk establishes as knowledge. This is the canonical content used for vector search and question answering. Maps to pages.compiled_truth.
compiled_truth.example: 缓考申请的完整流程包括：1. 学生填写缓考申请表；2. 辅导员审批（1个工作日内）；3. 教务处终审（3个工作日内）；4. 缓考安排通知。逾期未提交申请不予受理。

suggested_tags.description: Hierarchical tags inferred from content. Each item describes one level in a tag path. Maps to tags.name, tags.label, tags.description. The persistence layer handles parent-child linking and ltree path computation.

name.description: Machine-readable short name, lowercase with underscores. Maps to tags.name.

label.description: Human-readable display name. Maps to tags.label.

description.description: One-line explanation of this tag's scope. Maps to tags.description.
description.example: 与缓考申请、审批、安排相关的政策规定

parent_hint.description: Suggested parent tag name. If left empty or unmatched, the tag is created as a root-level tag. Used by the persistence layer for tag tree insertion.

entities.description: Named entities extracted from the chunk. Used to enrich compiled_truth and may be stored in raw_chunks.extra_metadata.

name.description: Entity name as it appears in the text.

type.description: Entity category for filtering and faceted search.

description.description: Concise description of this entity in context.
description.example: 缓考申请的必需表单，需包含学生信息、课程信息、缓考原因和证明材料

attributes.description: Optional structured properties specific to this entity type. For example, a 'procedure' entity may have 'steps', a 'date_range' may have 'start'/'end'.

temporal.description: Temporal validity extracted from the chunk content. Maps to raw_chunks.effective_range and pages.effective_range (as tstzrange).

start.description: Earliest effective date mentioned (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). null if not applicable.

end.description: Latest effective date or expiration (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). null if indefinite or not applicable.

description.description: Natural language description of the time range for human review.

open_threads.description: Unresolved questions, ambiguities, or conflicts identified in this chunk. Maps to pages.open_threads (JSONB).

items.description: A specific question or issue that needs further resolution.
items.example: 待确认：2025版学生手册中缓考截止时间与此处规定不一致（48小时 vs 24小时）

see_also_hints.description: Topic keywords or phrases that suggest cross-references to other pages. The persistence layer resolves these to page UUIDs via semantic search. Maps to pages.see_also (UUID[]).

items.description: A topic keyword or short phrase.

confidence.description: LLM self-assessment of extraction quality. Used for downstream filtering and human review prioritization.

compiled_truth.description: Confidence in compiled_truth accuracy and completeness.

temporal.description: Confidence in temporal range extraction accuracy.

overall.description: Aggregate confidence score. Chunks with overall < 0.5 should be flagged for human review.
